chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. Application No.S-205 of 2019 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For hearing of main case 2. For hearing of MA No.1494/2019 01-04-2019 Mr. Ubedullah Kalwar, Advocate for the applicant Mr. Khalil Ahmed Maitlo, DPG.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned counsel for the applicant files certified true copy of the case diary dated 16.03.2019 and late diary dated 16.03.2019 and states that accused Muhammad Siddique and Noman have surrendered before the court concerned, therefore, this application has become infructuous. Accordingly, this application is dismissed on being become infructuous. JUDGE Suleman Khan/PA
